text_block_list.text: Brian's making some amazing progress at summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... huff...

She's running along the beach alone, using her drive to race as fuel to
push forward. But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's the morning routine done.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The afternoon will be free practice as planned... Hm?

Summer camp should be a special opportunity for her to race against
others too. I wonder who—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Get your head in the game.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I know.

I decide to find a practice partner right away so we can make the
most out of this training camp.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm... Is that my trainer? What's going on over there?

text_block_list.name: Bun-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
A scrimmage against Narita Brian?! Absolutely not! I can already
picture my humiliating defeat!
choice_data_list: Come on—no one wins 'em all, right?
Come on—no one wins 'em all, right?

text_block_list.name: Bun-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: W-well, sure, but still... Umm, geez... I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Blue-ribboned Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I'd need to build up my skills first before racing Brian. It'd
be rude to waste her time.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'd both get a lot out of it!
I'm sure you'd both get a lot out of it!

text_block_list.name: Blue-ribboned Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I hear what you're saying, and maybe I'm just making excuses... But
sorry, I'll need to think about it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What's the deal? Why are you trying so hard?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(Thinking back, that stubbornness was the same when we first met. It
never mattered how dismissive I was...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Are you... trying to share my hunger for racing? This... painful burden
of mine?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I guess that's just who my trainer is.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Thinking about it like that, maybe we're both looking for some
extra fire to keep us burning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(After all, it was you who gave me this chance. You got my passion for
running to thrive again.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My desire is still strong. It only gets stronger the more I run. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It feels nostalgic too... Like something I thought I'd lost...

In my frantic search for a practice opponent, I don't even realize it's
gotten dark out.
In the end, not one person would accept, and I'm left empty-handed.
choice_data_list: I couldn't do a thing for her...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's summer, but the breeze gets chilly at night. You'll catch a cold out
here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I know what you've been up to all day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it. Plenty of opponents will be waiting back at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I did find something, though. In all my craving for a challenge, I realized I had hope too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I think maybe you taught me that. So, well...

She's not one to hesitate when she talks. Could this mean she's...
trying to cheer me up?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Good. Let's get back.

While we walk back, Brian is almost acting shy. And though it's faint,
she even smiles a bit, like a little kid.
I step outside the next morning and see something unbelievable.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Blue-ribboned Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I thought about it, and I'd like to at least give it a try. A chance like
this doesn't come often after all.

text_block_list.name: Bun-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: And it's important to get a real sense for where you're at! So, like...

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: You're on, Narita Brian!

Lined up outside the dorms is a crowd of all the runners I'd asked
yesterday to race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, haha! I guess drive is contagious. I can see you're all burning with
it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But it's the same for me... All right. I'll take each and every one of you
on!

text_block_list.name: Blue-ribboned Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, Brian?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Blue-ribboned Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You've found yourself a great trainer. Honestly, I'm jealous.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh... Damn straight.

Waves crash amid the thunderous footsteps of the fired up racers.
The sound of it leaves me in awe.
